/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/EscapeRoom.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EscapeRoom.dir/src/shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EscapeRoom.dir/src/player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EscapeRoom.dir/src/collision.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EscapeRoom.dir/src/lighting.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EscapeRoom.dir/src/inventory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EscapeRoom.dir/src/puzzle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EscapeRoom.dir/src/room.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EscapeRoom.dir/src/renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EscapeRoom.dir/src/particle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EscapeRoom.dir/src/ui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EscapeRoom.dir/src/saveload.cpp.o -o EscapeRoom  _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a _deps/glad-build/libglad.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libX11.so
